hero.title: AI-Powered Medical Meta-Analysis
hero.subtitle: Enter medical keywords and get instant AI-powered meta-analysis summaries from 40M+ PubMed papers.
hero.step1Desc: Type medical terms, drug names, or conditions you want to investigate.
hero.step2Desc: Our system searches 40M+ papers to find the most relevant studies.
hero.step3Desc: AI reads the abstracts and generates a structured meta-analysis summary.
hero.step4Desc: Receive key findings with source citations and links to original papers.
hero.popularDesc: Explore AI-powered comparisons of commonly compared medications.

footer.feedback: Have a suggestion? Let us know

about.title: About MetaLens AI
about.missionText: MetaLens AI was created by SPINAI to democratize access to medical research insights. We believe every healthcare professional, student, and researcher should be able to quickly synthesize evidence from thousands of papers — without expensive subscriptions or hours of manual review.
about.whyText: Medical professionals make evidence-based decisions daily, yet reviewing dozens of research papers is time-consuming. Existing tools like Elicit and Consensus charge $10–50/month. MetaLens AI provides instant, structured summaries from 40M+ PubMed papers — completely free.
about.howWeWorkText: We combine PubMed's comprehensive biomedical database with advanced AI synthesis to analyze research abstracts and produce structured meta-analysis summaries in seconds. Our pipeline: keyword search → PubMed API → abstract retrieval → AI synthesis → structured findings with citations.
about.transparencyText: MetaLens AI analyzes abstracts, not full-text papers. AI can make errors or miss nuances. We use hedging language and always link to original sources so you can verify findings. This tool supplements — never replaces — expert medical judgment.
about.openText: MetaLens AI runs on zero-cost infrastructure: PubMed's free API, open AI models, and Vercel's free hosting tier. No API keys, no accounts, no paywalls for the free tier. We believe research accessibility shouldn't have a price tag.
about.contactText: Have questions, feedback, or collaboration ideas? Reach out at

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Text: Type in medical terms, drug names, conditions, or any research keywords you want to investigate.
howItWorks.step2Text: Our system searches PubMed's 40M+ papers to find the most relevant studies for your query.
howItWorks.step3Text: Advanced AI reads the abstracts and synthesizes a structured meta-analysis summary with key findings.
howItWorks.step4Text: Receive a concise summary with source citations and links to the original papers.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes! MetaLens AI offers a free tier with 5 analyses per day. Pro and Team plans are available for power users.
faq.q2: Where does the data come from?
faq.a2: All research data comes from PubMed, the world's largest biomedical literature database maintained by the National Library of Medicine.
faq.a3: No. MetaLens AI provides AI-generated research summaries for informational purposes only. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical decisions.
faq.a4: Our AI synthesizes findings directly from peer-reviewed abstracts. While we strive for accuracy, AI can make mistakes. Always verify findings with the original sources.
faq.a5: MetaLens AI automatically detects your browser language and supports English, Korean, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, Portuguese, German, and French.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: MetaLens AI by SPINAI respects your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
privacy.s1Text: We collect minimal anonymous usage data — search keywords, browser language, number of papers found, and a random session identifier — to improve our service. We do not collect personally identifiable information (PII) such as names, email addresses, or IP addresses.
privacy.s2Text: Your search keywords are sent to PubMed (NIH) and our AI provider (Pollinations.ai) for processing. Queries are not stored on our servers after processing is complete.
privacy.s3Text: We do not use tracking cookies, advertising pixels, or fingerprinting. A random session ID is generated in your browser per visit for anonymous analytics only and is never linked to your identity.
privacy.s4Text:
We integrate with the following third-party services, each governed by their own privacy policies:
• PubMed (NCBI/NIH) — research data retrieval
• Pollinations.ai — AI text synthesis
• Google Sheets (via Apps Script) — anonymous analytics aggregation
• Vercel — website hosting and edge delivery
privacy.s5Text: Anonymous aggregated usage statistics are retained for up to 12 months for product improvement and then deleted. No personal data is retained because none is collected.
privacy.s6Text: Since we do not collect PII, there is no personal data to access, correct, or delete. If you have concerns about any data associated with your use, contact us and we will assist you promptly. For users in the EU (GDPR) or California (CCPA), we affirm that we do not sell, share, or process personal data for advertising purposes.
privacy.s7Text: MetaLens AI is not a covered entity under HIPAA. This tool synthesizes publicly available research abstracts and does not process, store, or transmit protected health information (PHI).
privacy.s8Text: This service is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.
privacy.s9Text: All data transmission is encrypted via HTTPS/TLS. We follow industry-standard security practices to protect the integrity of our service.
privacy.s10Text: We may update this policy. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
Last updated: March 2026

By using MetaLens AI, you agree to the following terms:

1. Nature of Service: MetaLens AI provides AI-generated summaries of publicly available PubMed research abstracts. Results are for informational and educational purposes only.

2. Not Medical Advice: Nothing on this site constitutes medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment recommendations. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional before making medical decisions.

3. Accuracy: While we strive for accuracy, AI can produce errors, hallucinations, or misinterpretations. Always verify findings with the original source papers.

4. Limitation of Liability: SPINAI is not liable for any decisions, actions, or outcomes based on the information provided by MetaLens AI.

5. Fair Use: Free tier users may perform up to 5 analyses per day. Automated scraping or abuse of the service is prohibited.

6. Intellectual Property: The MetaLens AI name, logo, and design are property of SPINAI. Research abstracts are sourced from PubMed/NCBI and are subject to their terms.

7. Changes: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time.

Contact: taeshinkim11@gmail.com
